name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v4.98: Payday probe now scans invoice/payment/customer endpoint paths AND tests customer-by-ssn (kennitala) lookup, so the backend can resolve an operator’s Payday customer id from their kennitala automatically. Token confirmed (accessToken). Includes v4.96 bilingual Billing portal + operator Payday-link field.
